name: beehiiv-get-referral-program
description: Retrieve the referral program milestones and reward definitions for a Beehiiv publication. Use to build referral reward automation workflows: check a subscriber's referral count, compare against milestone thresholds, and trigger reward fulfillment.

API_KEY_SECRET.description: Vault path to the Beehiiv API key (e.g. 'beehiiv/api_key').

PUBLICATION_ID.description: Beehiiv publication ID (e.g. 'pub_xxx...'). Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

REFERRAL_COUNT.description: When set to a subscriber's current referral count (e.g. '{{referral_count}}' from an upstream beehiiv-get-subscriber node), the output includes 'next_milestone' (the next uncrossed milestone) and 'crossed_milestones' (all milestones the subscriber has reached). Use in condition nodes to trigger reward fulfillment.

setup_instructions.title: Enable the referral program
setup_instructions.detail: In your Beehiiv dashboard, go to Grow > Referral Program and enable it. Configure milestones and rewards (physical items, promo codes, digital downloads, or premium access).

setup_instructions.title: Automated reward fulfillment pattern
setup_instructions.detail: Chain: [beehiiv webhook: subscription.created with referral_code] → [beehiiv-get-subscriber: expand=stats,referrals] → [beehiiv-get-referral-program: REFERRAL_COUNT={{stats.referrals_count}}] → [condition: crossed_milestones is not empty] → [send reward via email or external system].

setup_instructions.title: Note on reward fulfillment
setup_instructions.detail: Beehiiv supports auto_fulfill for some reward types. This node surfaces the milestone/reward definitions; actual fulfillment of non-auto rewards (physical goods, promo codes) should be handled by downstream nodes (e.g. send-gmail, http-request to your fulfillment system).
